title: Senior Project Manager – Aerostructures (Contract)
description_raw:
Matchtech are working exclusively with a leading Tier-1 aerospace manufacturer to source a Senior Project Manager for a 12-month contract role based in Filton, Bristol.

The successful candidate will lead the delivery of an aerostructures modification programme on a major commercial aircraft programme. Working within a rigorous AS9100 / DO-178C environment, you will manage cost, schedule and technical scope across a team of approximately 20 engineers and technicians.

Responsibilities:
- Own the programme master schedule (MS Project / Primavera P6) and report progress to the engineering director
- Lead weekly IPTs (Integrated Product Teams) with stress, design, manufacturing and test disciplines
- Manage change control under the company’s Change Management Procedure (CMP)
- Interface with customer technical authority and certification authority as required
- Track and resolve EIS (Entry Into Service) gate criteria

Required background:
- Degree-qualified mechanical or aeronautical engineer
- 8+ years engineering project management, minimum 4 years in aerospace
- APM PMQ or PMP (PMI) or Prince2 Practitioner
- Proficient with AS9100 quality systems and APQP
- Composites programme experience advantageous

Rate: £650 per day, outside IR35
Duration: 12 months (strong possibility of extension to 18 months)
Start date: 3 August 2026
SC clearance: not required; BPSS may apply
